$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for BidVoice brand assets. Edit masters in brand/masters/, then run `npm run brand-sync` to push them to every consuming surface. Never hand-edit the destination files — they are generated. See brand/BRAND.md.

brand.positioning: BidVoice is the AI Construction Operating System. Eden is your AI employee.
brand.wordmarkNote: One word, camelCase capital V: Bid + Voice. Never 'Bid Voice', 'BidVOICE', or 'Bidvoice'. Legacy 'BidTranslator' is retired everywhere.

color.note: amber = primary accent (the 'Voice' in the wordmark, CTAs). amberDeep = theme-color / darker amber. ink = dark surface + text. paper = light surface.

typography.note: Do not substitute fonts. The official logo lockup, if supplied as artwork, overrides the typographic wordmark.

pending.note: The masters currently hold the interim marks. Replace each master with the export from the OFFICIAL BidVoice logo (do NOT recreate/redraw), then run `npm run brand-sync`. Sizes must match destinations (no resizer in this environment): 192x192, 512x512, 180x180 (apple-touch), 1200x630 (og), 2400x1260 (og@2x).
